# selectionFrame()

**Instance Method**

Returns the receiver’s selection frame rectangle, which defines the position of the selection rectangle in its [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserView].

## Declaration

```swift
func selectionFrame() -> NSRect
```

## Return Value

The cells selection frame, in the `IKImageBrowserView` coordinate space.

## Discussion

Subclasses can override this method to customize the position of the selection frame.

## Selection Handling

- **isSelected()**: Returns whether the cell is selected.
